evidence: "The script is sung instead of spoken."
"The movie seemed more of a Douglas history than an entertaining movie."
"The one with Tom Hardy plays a more brooding Heathcliff."
"The Mentalist became so condescending and 'know-it all' that I almost wanted HIM to be a victim!"
"The Blu-ray picture is great as are the actors and cinematography."
"The special effects look more authentic, also."
"I have all the collections so far & hope they keep 'em coming!"
"Don't get me wrong, I LIKE Timothy Dalton & his Heathcliff was great."
"It was like being in the tour group again!"
"The film takes you across the gorgeous landscape & the inside tour is beautiful."
"Helped me understand more clearly the situation over there."
"You see how much work & money it costs the families to maintain their ancestral homes."

summary: The user enjoys documentaries and light dramas, particularly those with high production quality and sensory experiences. They have mixed feelings about narrative complexity and pacing, indicating a preference for straightforward storytelling but appreciate character development.
